Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
The first step is to choose the right EC2 instance type and storage solution. *  
Model overfitting can occur if the training data is not diverse enough. *  

Deploying a deep learning model on AWS involves setting up a scalable architecture. * * *  
The next step is to configure security groups and IAM roles for access control. *  
Data security is critical to prevent unauthorized access. *  

Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires monitoring and optimization. * * *  
The final step is to implement continuous learning and model tuning. *  
Overfitting and data security are ongoing challenges. *
